announcements.title: Migrating to Standalone Licenses
announcements.body:
### Important: Microsoft Store → Standalone Licenses

DR Sim Manager is moving away from the Microsoft Store to a standalone licensing system.

**If you purchased through the Microsoft Store, you will receive a free standalone license key** — no repurchase needed.

Future updates will be available from our **[GitHub Releases page](https://github.com/DepartedReality/dr-sim-manager-releases/releases)**.

For migration instructions, see the **[Migration Guide](https://docs.departedreality.com/dr-sim-manager/general/licensing#migrating-from-microsoft-store)**.

announcements.title: Join Our Discord Server
announcements.body:
### Join the DR Sim Manager Community

We have an official Discord server! Connect with other sim racers, get support, share your setups, and stay up to date with the latest news.

**[Join Discord](https://discord.gg/skn2HzpbQy)**
